description_long: This object is a vertical speed limit sign commonly found in urban environments, featuring a rectangular white face with a bold red circular border and the black numeral '10' at its center, indicating a speed limit of 10 kilometers per hour. The sign face is mounted atop a long, slender, round metal pole, which is dark gray or black in color and extends well below the sign for secure installation into the ground. The sign's front is highly visible, with clear, legible numerals and a contrasting color scheme designed for maximum readability. The back of the sign is plain and unmarked, showing only the metal surface. The pole appears sturdy and weather-resistant, suitable for outdoor use in various conditions. The overall construction suggests durability and resistance to tampering or environmental wear.
description: A white rectangular speed limit sign with a red border and the number '10' in black, mounted on a tall, round metal pole. Designed for clear visibility and durability in urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the plain, unmarked back of the sign and the full length of the dark metal pole.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the sign face and the round, slender pole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the white sign face with a red border and the black numeral '10', mounted on a vertical pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim profile of the sign and pole.
